content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.48%, BankNifty -0.71%, but IT/Pharma green and India VIX up 2.6% to 17.05. Mixed tape with sector rotation visible — defense, specialty chem, capital goods, BFSI all printing strong individual breakouts on earnings. Book is +1.5% on the day with 12 holdings printing 8 gainers — focus is risk-management on existing book first, selective adds where R:R clears the bar.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1060.65,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+9.9% unrealized at 1081.50, 52w high 1141.90 within reach. Q4 PAT +19.2% YoY, GNPA 0.93% best-in-class. Original target 1110 nearly hit; raise target to 1135 (just below 52w high). SL 1060.65 already at breakeven+, 1.9% trail-gap below CMP — keep as-is (within 1% rule check: gap = 1.9%, fine). Target widened to capture remaining momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% on defensive gold ETF. SL 121 about 2.6% below CMP, target 135 still ~8.5% upside. India VIX rising +2.6% supports gold hedge thesis. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 4,
      "reasoning": "+4.7% at 4795. Board meeting May 14 (Q4 results) — 4 sessions away, just outside the 3-session binary window. Bullish brokerage upgrades (JM Fin TP 4875, ICICI Sec top pick). SL 4725.56 = 1.4% trail-gap, acceptable. Raise target to 5000 (below 52w high 5165) to extend on the momentum. Plan: exit before May 13 close to avoid Q4 binary tail per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+1.8% at 7030. Q4 already announced (PAT +124% YoY), at 52w high zone. SL 6960 = 1.0% trail-gap (right at the floor) — keep as-is. Target 7400 unchanged. No-op MODIFY note: this preserves the trail; not loosening, not micro-adjusting. Actually emitting HOLD instead per discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% at 841.75. Q4 board meeting expected May 2026 (date TBA — uncertainty on binary timing). SL 836 only 0.7% below CMP — within trail-gap floor risk if I tighten further. Hold as-is; if Q4 date confirms within 3 sessions will revisit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% at 366.30. Q4 already announced May 4 (PAT +30.6% YoY) — no binary risk. SL 365 = 0.4% below CMP, very tight; will likely fire on normal noise but per Rule 17, do not preempt. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% at 832.85. Q4 announced May 5 (revenue +22% YoY, no binary). SL at breakeven 820 = 1.6% gap, acceptable. Target 860 unchanged. Emitting HOLD instead since values unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.46,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+6.3% at 1337.90. Q4 announced May 5-6 (PAT +134% YoY). Brokerage TPs Rs 1,690-2,100. SL 1310.46 = 2.0% trail-gap, healthy. Values unchanged — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% at 3063.60. Q4 already announced. SL at breakeven 3025 = 1.3% gap. Values unchanged — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 821.88,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+4.0% at 838. Q4 announced May 4 (margins record 46.3%). SL 821.88 = 1.9% trail-gap, healthy. Nuvama TP 910. Raise target from 870 to 875 (still below 52w high 875). R:R from current entry maintained."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% at 1481.90 after entering on Q4 beat (+8.33% intraday move was the entry context). Q4 already printed. SL 1445 = 2.5% below CMP, target 1575 = 6.3% above. R:R intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% at 2419.80. Q4 announced May 7 (PAT +88%, EBITDA margin 33.6% best-in-class). Earnings call TODAY 16:00 IST — that IS a binary event within 0 sessions. Position is -1.4% and SL 2395 is 1% below CMP. Per Rule 11: I should consider tightening further or exiting before 16:00. Choosing (b)-style: hold with current SL through call, but flagging as event-trade. Actually safer: tighten SL to 2400 to cap loss before call. Revising — see next decision."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2400.00,
      "new_target": 2590.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Lupin earnings concall at 16:00 IST today — binary event. Current SL 2395 (-3.0% from entry); CMP 2419.80, gap to SL ~0.8% which is below the 1% trail-floor. Tightening to 2400 (-2.8% from entry, 0.8% below CMP) — wait, that violates trail-floor too. Reconsidering: leave SL at 2395 (1.0% gap, exactly at floor) — emit HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1060.65 already at breakeven+, 1.9% trail-gap. Target raise to 1135 via MODIFY above."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Target raised to 5000 via MODIFY. Plan exit before May 13 close (Q4 May 14 binary)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings call at 16:00 IST — binary event today. Position at -1.4%, SL 2395 (1% below CMP at trail-floor). Cannot tighten further without violating trail-gap discipline. Will reassess at 15:00 (before call) — if still red, will exit ahead of call per Rule 11(a)."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed BULLISH watchlist candidates (modifier ≥ +0.05) for new admits per Rule 18. PIDILITIND, COFORGE, CAMS, MARICO, ABCAPITAL, GRSE, NAVINFLUOR, HAL, LUPIN, TITAGARH already held — no add (correlation/cluster risk). PNBHOUSING already held. Remaining BULLISH new candidates: TITAGARH (held), HAL (held). RAMCOCEM rated BEARISH — skip. SRF/POLYCAB/FINCABLES/TATATECH/WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS/KPIL/BHARATFORG/GABRIEL — no per-stock research provided in this batch, so cannot enter without due diligence per Rule 13. GOLDBEES held. Net: book already covers BFSI (PNBHOUSING/CAMS/ABCAPITAL), Defense (HAL/GRSE), Capital Goods (TITAGARH), Pharma (LUPIN), IT (COFORGE), Specialty Chem (NAVINFLUOR/PIDILITIND), FMCG (MARICO), Gold ETF — well-diversified at 58% deployed. Cash ₹421K (42%) sits as buffer for additional admits in next batch when fresh BULLISH-rated candidates with research surface. Rule 18 audit: no qualifying new BULLISH name with research data was rejected via anchoring; it was rejected because the candidate is already held or research data is absent.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +1.5% on the day with 8 of 12 positions green. Key risk today: LUPIN earnings call at 16:00 IST — will revisit at 15:00 to decide hold-or-exit. HAL Q4 May 14 — exit by May 13 close. TITAGARH Q4 May TBD — monitor news for date confirmation. Cluster check: BFSI = ABCAPITAL (3.6%) + PNBHOUSING (8.5%) + CAMS (2.0%) ≈ 14% of capital — within 35% sector cap and 20% cluster guideline. Capital Goods = HAL (5.2%) + TITAGARH (5.0%) + GRSE (4.9%) ≈ 15% — within limits. Specialty Chem = NAVINFLUOR (4.9%) + PIDILITIND (4.9%) ≈ 9.8%. Healthy diversification. HFCL pending BUY @ 133.50 has been OPEN for 3208 minutes (~53 hours) — that's stale; will cancel in next cycle if still working and thesis decayed. Daily P&L within limits, no distress signals."
}
